HGSS.541.0000:
Lyra: [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Professor Elm was looking for you.
Did you go to his lab?
HGSS.541.0001:
Ethan: [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Professor Elm was looking for you.
Did you go to his lab?
HGSS.541.0002:
Lyra: My MARILL is super cute...
But your [0100,0001,0000] looks pretty\r
good, too, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.541.0003:
Ethan: My MARILL is super cool...
But your [0100,0001,0000] looks pretty\r
good, too, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.541.0005:
Lyra: Isn’t it strange that when we are
with Pokémon, going out is just so much\r
more fun!\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
Try going to different places and talk\r
to your Pokémon!\f
I bet you’ll find out so many things
about them!
HGSS.541.0006:
Ethan: Isn’t it strange that when we
are with Pokémon, going out is just so\r
much more fun!\f
[0103,0000,0000]!
Try going to different places and talk\r
to your Pokémon!\f
I bet you’ll find so many things
about them!
HGSS.541.0007:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are your Pokémon?\r
Don’t forget to talk to...\f
What’s that?
Your Pokémon is holding a leaf...\f
Could that be a Shiny Leaf?
Legend has it that only Pokémon\r
that have formed a close bond with\r
people can find such leaves...\f
People used to turn the leaves into a
beautiful crown when they managed\r
to collect five of them.\f
Wow!
I knew you could obtain one,\r
[0103,0000,0000]!\r
Let me see it when you find another!
HGSS.541.0008:
Ethan: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How are your Pokémon?\r
Don’t forget to talk to...\f
What’s that?
Your Pokémon is holding a leaf...\f
Could that be a Shiny Leaf?
Legend has it that only Pokémon\r
that have formed a close bond with\r
people can find such leaves...\f
People used to turn the leaves into a
beautiful crown when they managed\r
to collect five of them.\f
Wow!
I knew you could obtain one,\r
[0103,0000,0000]!\r
Let me see it when you find another!
HGSS.541.0009:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How is your Pokémon you’re\r
walking with?\f
You can talk to it as you walk from time
to time to nurture your friendship!\f
...
Oh!\f
You found a Shiny Leaf!
Let me see!\f
Ha! You’ve collected...\f
[0132,0001,0000]!\f
Way to go!
Keep it up and collect [0132,0002,0000] more!

HGSS.541.0011:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
How is your Pokémon you’re\r
walking with?\f
You can talk to it as you walk from time
to time to nurture your friendship!\f
...\f
Ha! You have already collected five\r
Shiny Leaves!\f
Let me turn them into a crown!
And what’s more...\r
I will give you this, too!\f

HGSS.541.0013:

Pokémon for years to come!

Pokémon for years to come!

How is your Pokémon?\f
You can talk to it as you walk from time
to time to nurture your friendship!\f
...\f
Oh, I get it.
Are you here to check on the award\r
with [0101,0001,0000]?\f
